title: Manager reconciles a late shift receipt
purpose: Test whether preview and finalization make late live information visible before an irreversible award.
starting_state: Use a disposable database with an active item-sales contest
At least one game is open
No game award or drawing is final
assignments: Apply one valid shift-manager tally with a separate late operation ID
Re-open the preview and compare the standings
Finalize only after the late receipt is reconciled and explicit confirmation is renewed
success_conditions: The late receipt is visible before finalization
The second preview visibly differs or identifies stale context
No award is finalized from the old preview
All required evidence and debrief artifacts validate
intentional_discoveries: Whether preview versions or UI language prevent finalizing stale standings
